headline: Trump ROASTS Starmer 🍊🔥 'Late to War Party' 🚢😩💥
text:
Trump 🍊👑 Daddy dropping TRUTH BOMBS 💣📱 on Truth Social, YEETING UK's aircraft carriers 🚢🚫 back to the DOCKS cuz US + Israel already SLAYED Iran 😤💥 – 'We don't NEED you latecomers joining wars AFTER we've WON 🏆😂!' Starmer 😴🇬🇧 simping HARD with HMS Prince of Wales 🛳️👑 crew on 5-day RED ALERT ⏰⚠️, but Trump like 'TOO LATE BRO, should've been here TWO WEEKS AGO ⌚😏!' Queen Elizabeth carrier? OUTTA COMMISSION 💤🛌 like Starmer's spine 🦴😬!

Back-and-forth BEEF 🥩🔥 hotter than a Middle East SUN ☀️🌵 – Trump salty 🧂😡 UK blocked US bombers 🛩️💨 at first, forcing EXTRA FLIGHT HOURS ✈️🛢️, calls Starmer 'NO Winston Churchill' 🚫🧔‍♂️💨! Keir whining in Sunday Mirror 📰😢 'Seriousness not games 🎮❌', but Kemi Badenoch 🍑🔥 ROASTS him at Tory conf: 'SITTING ON THE FENCE 😩🪑, we're IN this WAR whether you LIKE it or NOT 💣🇮🇷!' UK finally OKs 'defensive' B-1 bombers 🛩️⚔️ at RAF Fairford 🌍✈️ and Diego Garcia 🏝️, plus HMS Dragon 🐉🚢 air defense YEETING to Med next week to guard Akrotiri drones 🛩️🚫!

Trump on Air Force One ✈️👨‍✈️: 'LOYAL ones already IN 🫡💪, couldn't CARE LESS if you show up LATE 🚪😴!' Told CBS 'A LITTLE BIT LATE to send ships 😂⏰' – Starmer insists 'special relationship' STILL THICC ❤️‍🔥🤝, sharing intel 24/7 🕐🧠, but Trump MAD AF 😤 over initial BASE BLOCK 🚫🏗️! Tony Blair 👴🇮🇶 (Iraq War Daddy) whispering at private gig: 'US is INDISPENSABLE CORNERSTONE 🪨🇺🇸, allies gotta SHOW UP no matter WHO'S prez 🎭!' Downing Street GHOSTING 👻📵 Trump's post, MoD confirms carrier on HIGH READY 🚀🔴 – speculation FLYING 🕵️‍♂️💨 it's Med-bound to protect BRIT INTERESTS 🛡️🇬🇧, but insiders DOWNPLAYING like pros 🙄🤐!

Trump OWNS the narrative 📣🍊: 'Once GREAT Ally maybe THE GREATEST 🤩🇬🇧, but we REMEMBER who showed LATE 📝😠!' Starmer's Trump bromance 💔🚫 from premiership W to public SPAT 💥👊 – US jets LANDING in UK now 🛬✅ for 'defensive ops' against Iranian missile MADNESS 🚀😱, Keir: 'Iran's OUTRAGEOUS response THREATENS us peeps 🤬🛡️!' No regime change from SKIES ✈️❌, just national INTEREST vibes 🇬🇧🧠. WALL STREET? Nah, this is WORLD STAGE DRAMA 🎭🌍 with Trump as the ULTIMATE TROLL KING 👑😂💀!
